input_image.note: Small red apple, 512x512. Safe default for image inputs.

bestPracticeHint: Verified via SPA capture 2026-07-06. preset_id options: Soft skin=0ed5bcd5-0963-4483-90ea-54c359720727, Realistic skin=d4138357-912a-47c7-9b12-f3d3ab1c2338, Imperfect skin=fbb56f37-0249-4021-ba92-17e22665b154. output_width+output_height required.
sourceOfPreset: Open Chrome devtools on /apps/skin-enhancer, upload an image, click a preset card, observe the POST body preset_id in Network tab.
